refnamediv.refpurpose: Rotate a 3D volume around its slice axis.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imrotate3(volume, angle) out = imrotate3(volume, angle, axis)

listitem.para: Rotation angle in degrees. Current implementation rounds to a multiple of 90 degrees.
Rotation axis. Current implementation supports axis 3. Default is 3.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Rotates a 3D volume by multiples of 90 degrees around axis 3. Arbitrary-angle and other-axis interpolation are reserved for a future native volume backend.

refsection.title: Examples
